description_long: This sculpture depicts a dynamic human figure, possibly a deity or mythological character, standing on one leg atop a rounded pedestal. The figure is adorned with a headdress and jewelry, and holds a long, curved object in one hand, while the other hand is raised in a gesture. The body is detailed with muscular definition and traditional attire, including a sash and skirt. The sculpture is mounted on a square base with a red velvet-like covering, adding a sense of formality and reverence. The material appears to be dark metal, giving the piece a sense of weight and permanence.
description: A detailed dark metal sculpture of a human figure, possibly a deity, standing on one leg atop a decorated base and holding a curved object, with intricate attire and a red velvet-covered pedestal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the figure's profile, raised hand, and the curvature of the body, with the base and red covering visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the figure, the full length of the curved object, and the detailed headdress and attire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the other profile, the outstretched arm, and the figure's stance on the pedestal.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the face, both arms, the curved object, and the full posture of the figure atop the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure, possibly a deity or mythological character
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
